In Jataka Parijata. Vaidhyanatha Dikshita says:
~court from lagna or from the Moon sign and note which planets
occupy the tenth house. One can acquire wealth through father, if Sun
is in the 1oth house. Moon in 10 indicates wealth through mother; Mal'S
shows that which he gains through foe. Similarly Mercury through friend;
Jupiter through brother; Venus through wife; Saturn through seNants.
Find out the lords of the 1oth house counted from Lagna, Moon
and Sun. Judge the strongest of the lords. Note in which Navamsa sign,
